description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a slim build, standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides. The individual is dressed in a short-sleeved collared shirt tucked into a pair of fitted shorts, both garments featuring clean, simple lines. The figure's legs are bare from mid-thigh to the ankles, where they meet a pair of ankle-high socks and plain shoes. The head is adorned with short, straight hair that is parted to one side, framing a neutral facial expression. The overall appearance is minimalistic, with smooth surfaces and no visible accessories or carried items. The figure's proportions and attire suggest a casual, everyday urban context.
description: A slim adult figure in a collared shirt and shorts, standing upright with short hair and plain shoes. The style is minimalistic and casual, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the figure, highlighting the straight posture, short hair, and the fit of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the symmetrical stance, facial features, and the clean lines of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the other profile and the figure's relaxed arm position.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the head, shirt collar, and the fit of the shorts, with both arms visible at the sides.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved collared shirt and fitted shorts
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair parted to one side
